folio.label: 18v
folio.l: More æan myn , æ sterueth here in a cage
For I mote wepe , and wayle while I leue
With al the woo , æ prison may me ©eue
And eke w peyne , that loue me ©eueth also
That doubleth al my tåment , and my woo
¢ Ther with , the fyr of ielousie vp stirte
With Inne his brest , & hent hi~ by the herte
So wodly , æ he lyke was , to be hold
The Box tre , or the asshen , dede and cold
¢ Tha~ne seide he , O cruel goddes æ gouäne
This world w byndyngö , of ©oure word et äne
And wryte in the table , of Athamante
ñoure parlament , and ©oure et äne gunte
What is man kynde more , vn to ©ow hold
Than is a shepe , that rukketh in the fold
For slayn is man , rigút as an other best´
And dwelleth eke , x x in prisou~ , and arrest´
And hath seknes , and gret aduäsitee
And often tymes , giltlees ¹de
What gouänance is , in this prescience
That giltles , tåmentist Innocence
And ©et encreseth this , al my penaunce
That man is bounde , to his obseruance
For goddes sake , to letten of his wylle
There as a best may , al his lust fulfille
And whan a best is ded , he hath no peyne
But after his deth , a man mote wepe & pleyne
Though in æis world , he haue care and woo
W oute doute , it may stonde so
The answere of æis , lete I to deuynes
But wel I wot , in æis world gret peyne is
¢ Allas , I se a serpent or a thef´

note.notetxt: 467after this line there has been a pose in writing the last nine lines were added later. Probably jut a pause after a day work or for any other possible reason.ODR

folio.l: That many a trewe man , hath do . myschef
Gon at his large , & where hi~ list may tåne
But I mot be in prisou~ , thurugh Satåne
And eke æurugú Iuno Ielous , and eke wode
That hath wel ny destroyed , al the blode
Of Thebes , with his wast walles wyde
And venus sleth me , on æ other syde
For ielousye , and feer of æis Arcite
Now wyl I stynt , of Palamou~ a lyte
